title: Countess Mariza
writer: Julius Brammer, Alfred Grünwald, Fritz Friedmann-Frederich
actors: Dorothea Wieck, Hubert Marischka, Charlotte Ander
plot: When Gräfin Mariza visits her country estate it is certainly an event. She gives a party to celebrate her engagement to a certain Koloman Zsupan, who unexpectedly shows up. Her authoritarian ways collide with Török, her manager. B...
